column1: # Central per-bridge configuration table consumed by tool/bridge_helper.sh.
# Replaces scatter-gather env exports across 16 .hexa bridge files.
#   bridge          : short id matching bridge_helper.sh fetch <bridge> ...
#   ttl_s           : cache TTL seconds (3600 default for medium-velocity APIs;
#   min_interval_s  : polite minimum spacing between LIVE calls per bridge
#   ua              : User-Agent string (use '-' for none → curl default)
#   accept          : Accept header value (use '-' for none)
# Precedence (in helper): CLI arg > env var > config file > compiled default.
# Lines starting with '#' are comments. Empty lines ignored.
# Order below mirrors the per-bridge .hexa files in tool/.
